tools.name: Instant Photo
tools.description: Generate passport-size photo sheets instantly from any image. Supports multiple formats and layouts.
tools.longDescription: A powerful online tool that converts regular photos into perfectly sized passport photos. Upload any image, auto-crop to standard passport dimensions, and generate printable sheets with multiple copies. Supports various international passport photo standards.

tools.name: Cricket Speed Tracker
tools.description: Real-time AI-powered cricket bowling speed tracker using your phone's camera.
tools.longDescription: Track cricket bowling speeds in real-time using advanced computer vision and motion detection. Uses your device camera to detect ball trajectory and calculate speed in km/h and m/s. Features a professional dark-themed HUD with live metrics.

tools.name: Neon Hand Tracker
tools.description: AI-powered dual hand tracking with neon visual effects and real-time analytics.
tools.longDescription: A high-performance dual-hand tracking web application featuring predictive motion smoothing, intelligent nearest-neighbor finger mapping, and a real-time analytical HUD. Creates stunning neon visual effects that follow your hand movements.

tools.name: App Download Hub
tools.description: Secure one-click file download system with admin controls and analytics.
tools.longDescription: A modern, secure download platform featuring time-limited signed URLs, efficient file streaming with range header support, and robust admin controls for file management. Provides a seamless one-click download experience for APKs, PDFs, and other files.
